case_title: SYNCHRONY BANK VS. DANIELLE MASSELL ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MASSELL, DANIELLE DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-03-2020
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-24-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-25-2020 CONTINUED TO OCT-27-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-23-2020 CONTINUED TO AUG-25-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100108753)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-27-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
